name: SAL.Gen_Graphs

documentation.description:
As a special exception under Section 7 of GPL version 3, you are granted
additional permissions described in the GCC Runtime Library Exception,
version 3.1, as published by the Free Software Foundation.
Edge ids are unique graph-wide, assigned by Add_Edge.

array_types.name: Path
array_types.code: type Path is array (Positive range <>) of Path_Item;

record_types.name: Edge_Item
Path_Item

fields.name: Vertex
fields.description:
Edges describe the edges leading from the previous vertex
in the path to Vertex. If this is the first vertex in an open
path, Edges is empty. If it is the first vertex in a
cycle, the edge are from the last vertex in the cycle.

fields.name: Edges
fields.description:
Edges describe the edges leading from the previous vertex
in the path to Vertex. If this is the first vertex in an open
path, Edges is empty. If it is the first vertex in a
cycle, the edge are from the last vertex in the cycle.

subtypes.name: Edge_ID
subtypes.code: subtype Edge_ID is Base_Edge_ID range 1 .. Base_Edge_ID'Last;

documentation.description: Edge ids are unique graph-wide, assigned by Add_Edge.
Edge ids are unique graph-wide, assigned by Add_Edge.

Some bodies output debug info to Text_IO.Current_Output for
non-zero values of Trace.

subprograms.code: function "<" (Left, Right : in Path) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Add_Edge

documentation.description: Adds a directed edge from Vertex_A to Vertex_B.

subprograms.name: Count_Edges
subprograms.code: function Count_Edges (Graph : in Gen_Graphs.Graph) return Ada.Containers.Count_Type

subprograms.name: Count_Nodes
subprograms.code: function Count_Nodes (Graph : in Gen_Graphs.Graph) return Ada.Containers.Count_Type

subprograms.name: Edges
subprograms.code: function Edges (Graph : in Gen_Graphs.Graph; Vertex : in Vertex_Index) return Edge_Lists.List

documentation.description: All edges from Vertex, as set by Add_Edge.

subprograms.name: Find_Cycles
subprograms.code: function Find_Cycles (Graph : in Gen_Graphs.Graph) return Path_Arrays.Vector

documentation.description:
Return all cyclic paths in Graph, using algorithm [3] extended for
multigraphs.

Time complexity is linear in the number of nodes and edges.

subprograms.name: Find_Cycles_Tiernan
subprograms.code: function Find_Cycles_Tiernan (Graph : in Gen_Graphs.Graph) return Path_Arrays.Vector

documentation.description:
Return all cyclic paths in Graph, using algorithm [2] extended for
multigraphs.

Time complexity is exponential in the number of nodes. Used in
unit tests for Find_Cycles, since [2] is easier to
implement.

subprograms.name: Find_Paths

documentation.description:
Return all non-cyclic paths starting at From that lead to a To
edge, using algorithm [1]. First entry in each item in result is
From, with first edge. Last entry in result contains edge data for
To.

Raises Multigraph_Error if Graph is a multigraph.

subprograms.name: Image
subprograms.code: function Image (Item : in Edge_Item) return String

subprograms.name: Image
subprograms.code: function Image (Item : in Path) return String

subprograms.name: Loops
subprograms.code: function Loops (Graph : in Gen_Graphs.Graph) return Vertex_Lists.List

documentation.description: List of vertices that have an edge to themselves.

subprograms.name: Multigraph
subprograms.code: function Multigraph (Graph : in Gen_Graphs.Graph) return Boolean

documentation.description:
If more than one edge is added between two vertices, the graph is
a multigraph. The edges are given separate identifiers internally.

subprograms.name: Strongly_Connected_Components
subprograms.code:
function Strongly_Connected_Components
  (Graph            : in Adjacency_Structures.Vector;
   Non_Trivial_Only : in Boolean := False)
  return Component_Lists.List

documentation.description:
Find strongly connected components of Graph, using algorithm in [4].
If Non_Trivial_Only, don't include single-vertex components.

subprograms.name: To_Adjancency
subprograms.code: function To_Adjancency (Graph : in Gen_Graphs.Graph) return Adjacency_Structures.Vector

generic_instantiations.name: Adjacency_Structures
generic_instantiations.code:
package Adjacency_Structures is new SAL.Gen_Unbounded_Definite_Vectors
  (Vertex_Index, Vertex_Lists.List, Vertex_Lists.Empty_List);

documentation.description: Graphs with no Edge_ID or Edge_Data; useful as intermediate results.

generic_instantiations.name: Component_Lists
generic_instantiations.code: package Component_Lists is new Ada.Containers.Doubly_Linked_Lists (Vertex_Lists.List, Vertex_Lists."=");

generic_instantiations.name: Image
generic_instantiations.code:
function Image is new SAL.Ada_Containers.Gen_Doubly_Linked_Lists_Image
  (Element_Type  => Edge_Item,
   Lists         => Edge_Lists,
   Element_Image => Image);

generic_instantiations.name: Image
generic_instantiations.code:
function Image is new SAL.Ada_Containers.Gen_Doubly_Linked_Lists_Image
  (Vertex_Index, "=", Vertex_Lists, Trimmed_Image);

generic_instantiations.name: Path_Arrays
generic_instantiations.code: package Path_Arrays is new Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Vectors (Path_Index, Path);

formals.name: Edge_Image
formals.code: function Edge_Image (Item : in Edge_Data) return String
